title: Privacy Policy
body:
This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit edmondaporter.com (the "Site").

Information We Collect

When you visit the Site, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and some of the cookies installed on your device. As you browse, we also collect information about the individual web pages or books that you view, what websites or search terms referred you to the Site, and information about how you interact with the Site.

Google Analytics

We use Google Analytics 4 to help us understand how visitors engage with the Site. Google Analytics collects data such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, and page views. This information is aggregated and does not personally identify you.

You can read more about how Google uses your Personal Information here: https://policies.google.com/privacy

You can also opt-out of Google Analytics here: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout

Amazon Associates Disclaimer

Edmond A Porter is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com. When you click on links to various books on this Site and make a purchase, this can result in a commission that is credited to this Site.

How We Use Your Information

We use the device and analytics information that we collect to:

  • Improve and optimize our Site (for example, by generating analytics about how visitors browse and interact with the pages).
  • Assess the success of our book launches and marketing campaigns.
  • Ensure the Site loads properly and securely across different devices.

Sharing Your Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We only share information with service providers, like Google Analytics, strictly to power the analytics described above.

Your Rights and Managing Cookies

You have the right to understand how your data is used. You can disable or manage cookies through your web browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect how certain features of the Site function.

Contact Us

For more information about our privacy practices, or if you have questions, please contact us through the Contact form provided on the Site.

seo.metaDescription: Learn about how we collect, use, and protect your personal information on edmondaporter.com.
